summary: Iteration 38 - Real-Time Sync Layer, Instant Withdraw Engine, EventBus Integration Testing Complete. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard verified with system status banner showing REAL MODE, Cashout Engine ACTIVE, Instant Withdraw ACTIVE, Auto-Op Loop ACTIVE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-Time Sync Layer fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. (1) GET /api/sync/state returns real_mode=true, usdc_wallets (client/treasury/revenue with verified=true), hot_wallet (address, bnb, neno, gas_ok, available), user balances, platform metrics (total_users, total_transactions, completed_transactions, total_fees_collected), cashout_pipeline (pending_cashouts, completed_cashouts). (2) GET /api/sync/state/platform returns platform-wide state without user data (user=null). (3) GET /api/sync/instant-withdraw/status returns active=true, eur_routing config (sepa_instant_limit=5000, sepa_standard_limit=100000, primary_account=IT, swift_account=BE), queued/completed counts, total_withdrawn_eur, total_withdrawn_usdc, withdrawals_count, blocked_count. (4) GET /api/sync/reconciliation returns system_healthy=true, usdc_verified, pending_cashouts, reconciliation details with status=clean. (5) All sync endpoints require Bearer token auth (401 without). (6) Cashout Engine still running (from iteration 37). (7) Circle USDC wallets still working. (8) Auto-op loop still running. (9) EventBus is active and logging events. Frontend Admin Dashboard Overview tab shows green 'REAL MODE' status banner with Cashout Engine: ACTIVE, Instant Withdraw: ACTIVE, Auto-Op Loop: ACTIVE. Hot wallet shows 396.9660 NENO. Cashout Engine tab shows EUR accounts (IT+BE) and SEPA routing rules.
